source.name: Shopify Polaris
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Use an index table for collections of same-type resources that link to detail pages.
Support sorting/filtering for long lists and pagination for large collections.
Right-align numeric cells and expose status with badges or clear text.
accessibility_notes: Rows and subheaders need explicit relationships when grouping selectable resources.
Keyboard multi-selection and row actions should remain operable.
implementation_hints: Use for admin pages where each row represents a business object.
Do not make a table passive if the main task is navigation to resource details.
Separate UI state from sorting/filtering network logic.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Polaris index-table patterns for commerce/admin resource lists: same-type rows, status badges, row navigation, sorting/filtering, pagination, and bulk actions.
